nodes.title: ℹ️ About — 🧠 BrainDead Game-Engine Packing
widgets_values:
## Game-Engine Packing

Remove BG → **SAM3** isolates parts (shirt / pants / jacket) → per part: **greyscale cutout → normalize luma → center median** (each part's luma balanced *within its own mask*, black outside) → **BD Pack Channels**: R=shirt, G=pants, B=jacket in one RGB mask texture.

Each channel holds **only its part** (cutout greyscale) so they don't bleed.

*BD Atlas Pack here just demos tiling the parts into a grid — in practice you'd atlas finished **packed** textures or **flipbook** frames, not raw channels.*
